content:
I'm really falling down the rabbit hole on this woo woo stuff. Astral projection, manifestation, alien contact and channeling. I'm torn about if I actually believe it or I'm just enjoying the flight of fancy. It's hard to think that if this was a conspiracy, the government would be so effective at covering it up. But maybe it's only lying by omission. 
Manifestation is kind of a self fulfilling prophecy when you think about it. 
Going to get back into lucid dreaming like I used to as a kid. Journaling and meditation are important to me too. I really like this new me. It's fun! 
I don't think the Earth is flat and I don't think the moon landing was a hoax. 

No dosing today. Too much driving and bouldering so I didn't want to take the risk. Think I saw some more in the carpark but I didn't stop. Will be back on Thurs anyway.
